title: BUDGET durable state model
content: BUDGET_PLAN { string plan_id PK string period_start string period_end_exclusive string currency_code string active_revision_id FK }
BUDGET_PLAN_REVISION { string revision_id PK string plan_id FK int revision_number string status string payload_hash }
BUDGET_PLAN_ENTRY { string revision_id PK string category_id PK long planned_minor_units }
BUDGET_LIFECYCLE_EVENT { string event_id PK string plan_id FK string revision_id FK string event_type int event_sequence }
BUDGET_IDEMPOTENCY_RECORD { string key_digest PK string operation_id string request_hash string result_hash }
